title: SIWES Orientation
description: Mandatory orientation session for ND II students proceeding to industrial attachment.

title: Department Seminar: Introduction to Cloud Computing
description: Open seminar covering cloud computing fundamentals — AWS, Azure, and GCP basics, plus career pathways in cloud engineering.

title: First Semester Examinations Begin
description: First semester examinations for all Computer Science levels (ND I, ND II, HND I, HND II).
venue: Examination Halls (see portal for specific venue per course)

title: Inter-Departmental Hackathon
description: 24-hour hackathon open to Computer Science and Computer Engineering students. Teams of up to 4. Prizes for the top three projects.

title: Project Defense — HND II Final Year Students
description: Final year project defense for HND II Computer Science students. Attendance mandatory for all presenting students.

title: Career Talk: Breaking into Software Engineering
description: Guest talk from industry professionals on building a software engineering career after graduation, including SIWES-to-job pathways.
